somali.search_by_name_meaning_clade_or_place: Ku raadi magaca, macnaha, clade, ama goobta...
somali.microbes_fill_the_air_with_oxygen: Microbes-ku waxay hawada ka buuxiyaan oksijiin
somali.cambrian_explosion_animals_diversify: Qaraxa Cambrian — xayawaanku way kala duwanaadaan
somali.first_four_legged_animals_walk_on_land: Xayawaanka afar lugood ee ugu horreeya ayaa dhulka ku socda
somali.first_dinosaurs_appear: Dinosaurs-ka ugu horreeya ayaa soo muuqda
somali.asteroid_non_bird_dinosaurs_end: Asteroid — dhammaadka dinosaurs-ka aan shimbiraha ahayn
somali.map_of_where_dinosaur_fossils_are_foun: Khariidadda meesha lagu helo fossils-ka dinosaur maanta, qaaradda ahaan
somali.dozens_of_dinosaurs_are_preserved_with: Daraasiin dinosaurs ah ayaa lagu keydiyay baalal, laga bilaabo dhogor fudud ilaa baalal duulimaad dhab ah. Kuwo badan ayaa lahaa baalal muddo dheer ka hor inta uusan midkoodna duuli karin.
somali.birds_have_a_furcula_or_wishbone_so_di: Shimbiruhu waxay leeyihiin furcula, ama lafta rajada. Dinosaurs-ka theropod sida T. rex iyo Velociraptor sidoo kale way lahaayeen. Waa isla lafta isku mid ah.
somali.hollow_air_filled_bones: Lafo godan oo hawo ka buuxsanta
somali.bird_bones_are_light_and_filled_with_a: Lafaha shimbiraha way fudud yihiin oo waxaa ka buuxa kiisas hawo. Isla lafaha hawada ka buuxsanta ayaa ka muuqda dinosaurs badan, qayb ka mid ah nidaamka neefsashada oo shimbiraha u eg.
somali.the_classic_bird_footprint_three_toes_: Raadka cagta shimbir ee caadiga ah, saddex farood horay, wuxuu la mid yahay cagaha theropod. Raadadka fossil-ka dinosaur waxay u eg yihiin raadad shimbir oo waaweyn.
somali.dinosaurs_laid_eggs_in_nests_and_some_: Dinosaurs-ku waxay ukun ku dhigi jireen buulasha, qaarna, sida Citipati iyo Oviraptor, way ku fadhiisan jireen si ay u dhasaan ubadkooda, sida saxda ah ee shimbiruhu sameeyaan.
somali.birds_fold_their_wings_using_a_special: Shimbiruhu waxay baalashooda ku laabaan laf curcur gaar ah oo qaab dayax-bil ah leh. Isla lafta ayaa u oggolaatay dinosaurs qaar inay gacmahooda jidhka ku soo jiidaan.
somali.growth_rings_in_dinosaur_bones_show_ma: Wareegyada korriinta ee lafaha dinosaur waxay muujinayaan in kuwo badan si degdeg ah u koreen oo dhiig diiran lahaayeen, oo shimbiraha iyo naasleyda u eg in ka badan xamaaratada casriga ah.

lingala.search_by_name_meaning_clade_or_place: Luka na nkombo, ndimbola, klade, to esika...
lingala.first_life_simple_microbes: Bomoi ya liboso — ba-microbes ya pɛtɛɛ
lingala.cambrian_explosion_animals_diversify: Kopanzana ya Cambrian — banyama ekómi ndenge na ndenge
lingala.first_four_legged_animals_walk_on_land: Banyama ya makolo minei ya liboso etamboli na mabelé
lingala.the_great_dying_end_permian_extinction: Liwa Monene (kolimwa na nsuka ya Permian)
lingala.asteroid_non_bird_dinosaurs_end: Asteroid — nsuka ya ba-dinosaurs oyo ezali bandeke te
lingala.map_of_where_dinosaur_fossils_are_foun: Karte ya esika oyo bafosile ya dinosaur ezwami lelo, na kontiná
lingala.dozens_of_dinosaurs_are_preserved_with: Ba-dinosaurs ebele babombami na nsala, kobanda na nsala ya pɛtɛɛ tii na nsala ya solo ya kopumbwa. Mingi bazalaki na nsala kala liboso ete moko na bango akoka kopumbwa.
lingala.birds_have_a_furcula_or_wishbone_so_di: Bandeke bazali na furcula, to mokuwa ya mposa. Ba-dinosaurs ya theropod lokola T. rex na Velociraptor mpe bazalaki na yango. Ezali mokuwa kaka moko mpenza.
lingala.hollow_air_filled_bones: Mikuwa ya libulu oyo etondi na mopɛpɛ
lingala.bird_bones_are_light_and_filled_with_a: Mikuwa ya bandeke ezali pɛpɛlɛ mpe etondi na basaki ya mopɛpɛ. Mikuwa kaka wana oyo etondi na mopɛpɛ ebimaka na ba-dinosaurs mingi, eteni ya mosala ya kopema oyo ekokani na ndeke.
lingala.the_classic_bird_footprint_three_toes_: Litɔnɔ ya lokolo ya ndeke ya kala, misapi misato liboso, ekokani na makolo ya theropod. Bilembo ya lokolo ya fosile ya dinosaur emonanaka lokola bilembo ya lokolo ya bandeke minene.
lingala.dinosaurs_laid_eggs_in_nests_and_some_: Ba-dinosaurs ezalaki kobeta maki na bazala mpe mosusu, lokola Citipati na Oviraptor, ezalaki kovanda likoló na yango mpo na koyangela bana na yango, kaka ndenge bandeke esalaka.
lingala.birds_fold_their_wings_using_a_special: Bandeke egumbaka mapapu na bango na nzela ya mokuwa ya lobɔkɔ ya sipesiale oyo ezali na lolenge ya sanza-ndambo. Mokuwa kaka wana epesaki ba-dinosaurs mosusu nzela ya kobenda mabɔkɔ na bango pene na nzoto.
lingala.fast_growth_warm_bodies: Bokoli ya mbangu, banzoto ya molunge
lingala.growth_rings_in_dinosaur_bones_show_ma: Ba-anɔ ya bokoli na mikuwa ya dinosaur emonisaka ete mingi ekólaki mbangu mpe ezalaki na makila ya molunge, lokola bandeke na banyama ya mabɛlɛ koleka banyama ya kokɔlɔma ya mikolo oyo.
